reviews.review_description:
This is really really cool. Seeing the artist right in front of you and in my own house is sick.

But sharing this experience with my friends is even cooler

I have tried many other chat apps from Meta’s to VR Chat. I have the library to prove it. None of those app stuck for me. So when I downloaded the app and got into it with a few friends and a few strangers, it was a lot of fun and somehow more adult. 

The pass-through in your environment with several rooms to chose from.  Some are topics the room is about and some are just for Fun. For the first release the functionality is easy to use and it works better using your natural hands to interact with environment and others. 

If I am going to invite a friend to a VR chat space, I am now doing it with Chat XR. I also prefer an AR experience to a VR space for meeting up. Just get it…!

I love the resolution of this app. I can see performers up close in my living room. It’s AR to the next level, screwing around with games and trivia like all my homies are here with me. It’s a fun chill out space because it’s your own place, bt without the mess of having all your peeps over.

I love Chat XR, I enjoy sitting in my living room and using my hands to press stuff that is only there on my headset and talking to people and seeing them in my living room! This game has so many areas and topics to talk about, You can draw stuff in your room or wherever you are, Trivia, Discussions about anything really. And all on your Oculus! This game is amazing! <3 - The Favorite Beta Tester
Chat XR is a fun game to play. My favorite part is the art and being able to paint in 3D space simultaneously with friends. Theres a bunch of other rooms too like trivia

This app is incredible !   The ease of use, and quality of these 3D performers absolutely blew my mind and gave me the most amazing musical experience I’ve had thus far.    Good job to the developers who worked to bring this here for us all to enjoy.

reviews.review_title: Fun times in XR with Quest 3 !!!
reviews.review_description: You can easily spend a few hours hanging out with friends and making new ones. Trivia section is a lot of fun. Also music is awesome because it’s able to put musicians in your living room and they look real!  Download now tell your friends to do the same!
I’ve never experienced such an amazing be universe. The artists are all so good. I had fun exploring each world.

I had a blast with Chat XR’s trivia—my friends, and I played as both players and hosts on a game show. We also chilled in their art zone and created some awesome art together. And the Music Zone? Mind-blowing! Jay R, the King of Filipino R&B, performed in my living room like he was right there! My friends and I are definitely going to hang out here on the regular!
